name: preview
description: Retrieve a free preview of a therapy trajectory before purchase. Returns first session content and expected outcomes.

name: buy_skill
description: Purchase a single therapy skill via Bitcoin Lightning Network (25-100 satoshis). Returns a Lightning invoice for immediate payment.

name: buy_trajectory
description: Purchase a complete 12-week Corpus Systemics recovery trajectory via Bitcoin Lightning Network (150 satoshis). Returns a Lightning invoice.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: catalog · Public sink: catalog, assess.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: catalog · Public sink: catalog, assess

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
